summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CryptoVault crypto exchange platform with three implemented features: 1) Referral tier system (Bronze $10, Silver $15, Gold $20, Platinum $30), 2) Firebase push notifications (LIVE mode with real Firebase credentials), 3) SMTP email with fallback to mock. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend displays proper referral functionality and authentication flows.
passed_tests: User signup POST /api/auth/signup with email/password/name - working correctly
User login POST /api/auth/login returns user and sets cookies - working correctly
Referral summary GET /api/referrals/summary returns tier info (name, bonus, color, nextTier, allTiers) - working correctly
Signup with referral code POST /api/auth/signup with referral_code field - credits $10 to both wallets
After referral, referrer wallet GET /api/wallet/balance shows USD balance increase ($20 total)
Referral list GET /api/referrals returns referrals with tier field - working correctly
Referral leaderboard GET /api/referrals/leaderboard returns ranked users - working correctly
Push status GET /api/push/status returns mock_mode=false and firebase_setup_required=false - LIVE mode confirmed
Register FCM token POST /api/push/register-token - working correctly
Push status after token registration shows enabled=true - working correctly
Test push POST /api/push/test - sends notification via Firebase (LIVE mode, not mock)
Unregister push DELETE /api/push/unregister-token - working correctly
Frontend homepage loads correctly with CryptoVault branding and navigation
Frontend auth page loads with proper login/signup forms and data-testid attributes
Auth page with ?ref=CODE query param auto-fills referral code in signup form
Auto-switch to signup mode when referral link is used (?ref=4BPTM9LV)
Two-step signup process (Step 1: Account, Step 2: Personal + Referral)
Referral code input field present and auto-filled correctly
Authentication redirect working - /referrals redirects to auth when not logged in
All form elements present with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Firebase push notifications working in LIVE mode (not mock)
Referral tier system working with Bronze tier $10 bonus
Wallet crediting working correctly after referral signup

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI features working correctly, authentication flows working)
